message:
feat(connectors): sort file/dir traversal results for deterministic ordering

Add sorting to file discovery methods across all six connectors to ensure
consistent ordering regardless of filesystem enumeration order. This
eliminates non-determinism in search results and makes tests reliable
across different OS/filesystem combinations.

For chatgpt and claude_code connectors, also extract standalone helper
methods (conversation_files, session_files) that encapsulate the
walk-filter-sort pattern, reducing inline complexity in the main scan loop
and making the sorted traversal independently testable.

Changes per connector:
- aider: sort find_chat_files() results, add sorted-order test
- chatgpt: extract conversation_files() helper with sorting, sort
  find_conversation_dirs() by path, add tests for both
- claude_code: extract session_files() helper with sorting, add test
- codex: sort rollout_files() results, add sorted-order test
- cursor: sort find_db_files() results, add sorted-order test
- gemini: sort session_files() results, add sorted-order test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
